rows.label: qev065501_MSG0030
rows.name: Oh! Could you be [ST:playername ]?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0031
rows.name:
Just like Eri-yan said, you're
quite a catch! I don't dislike
people like you, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_JNK0050
rows.name: Thank

rows.label: qev065501_SEL0051
rows.name: Express your gratitude for now.

rows.label: qev065501_JNK0060
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev065501_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask who Eri-yan is.

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0032
rows.name: Well then, let's shake hands! Handshake![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0033
rows.name: ...Wait, Eri-yan? Why are you pouting?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0034
rows.name:
I am not letting my emotions
run wild over such a thing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0035
rows.name:
However... I simply do not want you
to speak so rudely to my savior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0036
rows.name: Eri-yan is, you see...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0037
rows.name:
Oh, speak of the devil and he
shall appear. Does looking at
this guy ring any bells?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0038
rows.name:
Lyvia, she is an ordinary Earthling.
There is no way she would notice, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0039
rows.name:
...You took care of me a while
ago. I am the Definian, Erio.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0040
rows.name:
I am living in this form now.
How is it? Is this me strange?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_JNK0070
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: qev065501_SEL0071
rows.name: Say it is to your liking.

rows.label: qev065501_JNK0080
rows.name: Criticize

rows.label: qev065501_SEL0081
rows.name: Say it is not your preference.

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0041
rows.name:
Is that so... I'm glad to hear
that... You truly are kind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0042
rows.name:
Why are you turning bright
red! Were you that happy?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0043
rows.name:
You are honest as always. I
see... So this won't do...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0044
rows.name:
Getting depressed over something
like this... good grief.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0045
rows.name:
Hehe, romance really does seem fun. I
want an Earthling girlfriend myself![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0046
rows.name:
[ST:playername ] is simply my savior... Stop
phrasing things in a way that
causes misunderstandings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0047
rows.name:
Furthermore, I have said this many times, but
we are Definians. There is no way we could
ever comprehend emotions such as romance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0048
rows.name:
Heh! You won't know that
unless you try, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0049
rows.name:
Say, [ST:playername ], I have a favor to ask. I
want you to bring me a suitable
candidate for a girlfriend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0050
rows.name:
See, rather than me asking out of nowhere,
having an Earthling like you mediate things
would make it go smoother, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0051
rows.name:
Alright! I've already picked out a few
cute girls who seem like good choices.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0052
rows.name:
Gina, Lucy, Ariel Sera... I want you
to talk to these three and bring the
one you think seems the best.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0053
rows.name:
Then I'll show you that even Definians
can properly engage in romance![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0054
rows.name:
Hey! Please! I want to experience
a burning romance. Bring me a
suitable candidate for a girlfriend![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0055
rows.name:
Alright! I've already picked out a few
cute girls who seem like good choices.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0056
rows.name:
Gina, Lucy, Ariel Sera... I want you
to talk to these three and bring the
one you think seems the best.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0057
rows.name:
Then I'll show you that even Definians
can properly engage in romance![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0059
rows.name:
The names of the girls I found are
Gina, Lucy, and Ariel Sera. Bring
me the girl who seems the best![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0072
rows.name:
I see, Gina! It's true that she is
interesting to talk to, and she might
be a good choice for a girlfriend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0073
rows.name:
I see, Lucy! It's true that she
is smart, and she might be a
good choice for a girlfriend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0074
rows.name:
I see, Ariel Sera! It's true that
she seems energetic, and she might
be a good choice for a girlfriend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0075
rows.name:
Now it's just a matter of how
to approach her. Say, do you
have any brilliant ideas?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_JNK0110
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev065501_SEL0111
rows.name: Tell him to hand over a present.

rows.label: qev065501_JNK0120
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev065501_SEL0121
rows.name: Tell him you don't know because you have no experience.

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0076
rows.name:
Heeh, are you the devoted
type? I also like kind girls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0077
rows.name:
In that case, maybe I'll give her
a Penginion, a Satori Narcissus,
and a Hummingstone as a present.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0078
rows.name:
Eh... Even Eri-yan is crazy about you, so
I thought you had a boyfriend or two.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0079
rows.name:
So that's not the case... Heeh...
That's a bit surprising, I guess?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0080
rows.name:
...Then I suppose I'll hand over a present. No
matter what kind of alien they are, there is no one
who wouldn't be happy to receive an item, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0081
rows.name:
The things to give... Let's see. A
Penginion, a Satori Narcissus, and a
Hummingstone should be fine, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0082
rows.name:
Say, go fetch those for me, will you?
If you do that, I'll figure out the
rest myself, so... Right? Please, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0083
rows.name:
Sorry to dump this on you, but...
Please, go fetch the presents for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0084
rows.name:
With those, I will firmly
grab hold of her heart![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0145
rows.name:
Welcome back, [ST:playername ]! Hehe, while I was waiting
for you, I was talking with Gina.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0146
rows.name:
She told me one interesting
story after another.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0147
rows.name:
You have a good eye for people,
don't you. Thank you for bringing
me such a wonderful person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0148
rows.name:
Hehe, aren't you saying some
happy things. I don't dislike
a man like you myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0149
rows.name:
Welcome back, [ST:playername ]! Hehe, while I was waiting
for you, I was talking with Lucy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0150
rows.name:
She broke down all sorts of knowledge
one after another and taught me in an
easy-to-understand way. I learned a lot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0151
rows.name:
You have a good eye for people,
don't you. Thank you for bringing
me such a wonderful person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0152
rows.name:
Everyone says my stories are boring,
yet... To have you say things like
that to me, I am honestly very happy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0153
rows.name:
Welcome back, [ST:playername ]! Hehe, while
I was waiting for you, I was
talking with Ariel Sera.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0154
rows.name:
She told me one fun story after
another about her jobs as a BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0155
rows.name:
You have a good eye for people,
don't you. Thank you for bringing
me such a wonderful person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0156
rows.name:
You listen to my stories with a smile,
so it makes it worth telling them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0157
rows.name: Yeah... I'm glad I met you too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0158
rows.name:
...So, how did it go on your
end? Did you get the presents?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0159
rows.name:
Wow... You really brought all of them...
It was tough, wasn't it? It's a bit
late for this now, but... my bad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0160
rows.name:
For some reason, you have this accommodating
aura that makes it seem like you'll listen to
any request, so I ended up depending on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_JNK0160
rows.name: Modesty

rows.label: qev065501_SEL0161
rows.name: Say that you don't have that kind of aura.

rows.label: qev065501_JNK0170
rows.name: Bashful

rows.label: qev065501_SEL0171
rows.name: Blush and show that you are bashful.

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0161
rows.name:
And then you go and say something
like that. It's so modest of you.
Honestly... I can't get enough of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0162
rows.name:
That blushing face is cute too.
Honestly... I can't get enough of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0163
rows.name: Well then, I'll take these...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0164
rows.name:
[ST:playername ], I'll give them to you! I thought about
it a lot, but the one I'm most interested
in is, how should I put it... you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0165
rows.name: Wh...!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0166
rows.name:
I'm sorry, Gina! While I was talking
to you, I realized something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0167
rows.name: The person I'm in love with is... [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0168
rows.name:
Besides, if you saw my true
form... You would come to
hate me... So it's no good.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0169
rows.name:
What are you saying! I've seen all sorts
of men, you know. No matter what kind
of guy you are, I wouldn't hate...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0170
rows.name:
Really? Then I'll show
you. You see, I'm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0171
rows.name: Not an Earthling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0172
rows.name: Kyaah...! Kyaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0173
rows.name: Hehe... As expected, she ran away...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0174
rows.name: Eh... what is that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0175
rows.name:
I'm sorry, Lucy! While I was talking
to you, I realized something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0176
rows.name: The person I'm in love with is... [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0177
rows.name:
Besides, if you saw my true form... You
would surely be turned off, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0178
rows.name:
...I wouldn't be particularly surprised.
This is not Earth. It wouldn't be
strange for anything to happen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0179
rows.name:
Really? Then I'll show
you. You see, I'm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0180
rows.name: Not an Earthling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0181
rows.name:
Mimicry capabilities... A rare case,
but not enough to be surprised.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0182
rows.name:
However, it appears that you are female...
I do not share those kinds of preferences.
That is all there is to it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0183
rows.name:
She didn't even change her
expression... She's an amazing person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0184
rows.name: H-Hey![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0185
rows.name:
I'm sorry, Ariel Sera! While I was
talking to you, I realized something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0186
rows.name: The person I'm in love with is... [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0187
rows.name:
Besides, if you saw my true form...
You would surely be turned off—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0188
rows.name:
There's no way that's true! No matter what
form you take, Lyvia is Lyvia, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0189
rows.name:
Really? Then I'll show
you. You see, I'm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0190
rows.name: Not an Earthling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0191
rows.name:
Hmph, so what? I was just happy that
you looked at me as a woman...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0192
rows.name:
...Heh, stupid! Go to hell! Just go
and get chummy with that woman![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0193
rows.name:
I'm sorry, Ariel Sera... But I'm sure
someone like you will meet a good guy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0194
rows.name: ...So, [ST:playername ]? What about you? Do you hate me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_JNK0180
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev065501_SEL0181
rows.name: Tell him you do not hate him.

rows.label: qev065501_JNK0190
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev065501_SEL0191
rows.name: Gently tell him he is not your type.

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0195
rows.name: Really!? Then...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0196
rows.name:
Heh... I see... But I won't give
up, you know? I'll keep approaching
you until you turn my way...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0197
rows.name:
...Stop it, Lyvia!! Do not
say strange things to [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0198
rows.name:
Hm? I'm not saying anything strange, you
know? Just that I like this person...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0199
rows.name:
That is exactly it! For some reason,
when I hear those words, my chest
feels like it is being torn apart.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0200
rows.name:
I do not understand the reason,
but... stop it, Lyvia. At this
rate, even I will become strange...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0201
rows.name: ...Hehe, I see how it is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0202
rows.name:
I get it, Eri-yan. I'll call a
truce for now. So don't make a
face like you're about to cry![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0203
rows.name:
...[ST:playername ], you are quite the heartbreaker. Driving
two Definians this crazy, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065501_MSG0204
rows.name:
Well, at least accept this much. It's
my feelings for you. Um... I don't
need anything in return for now![ST:wait ]
